name: cleanmark
description: 清墨：一款从零独立开发的桌面 Markdown 编辑器。

scripts.check: npm run build && node --check electron/main.cjs && node --check electron/preload.cjs
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-e2e.mjs && electron . --e2e-test --e2e-dir=test-results/md-workspace
scripts.package:win: npm run build:icon && npm run build && node scripts/package-win.mjs
